Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class CardPaymentMethod

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.CardPaymentMethod
public class CardPaymentMethod extends SObject

Java class for CardPaymentMethod complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CardPaymentMethod">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Account" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuditEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AutoCardType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CardBin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CardCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CardHolderFirstName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CardHolderLastName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CardHolderName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CardLastFour" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CardPaymentMethodNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CardType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CardTypeCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Comments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CompanyName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DisplayCardNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Email" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExpiryMonth" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExpiryYear" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayResultCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayResultCodeDescription" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayToken" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayTokenDetails" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayTokenEncrypted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InputCardNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IpAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAutoPayEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MacAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NickName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentAuthorizations" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGateway" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}PaymentGateway" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGatewayId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGatewayLogs" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodAddress" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}address" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodCity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodCountry" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodDetails" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodGeocodeAccuracy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodLatitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodLongitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodPostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodStreet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodSubType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Payments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Phone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessingMode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Refunds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SfResultCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartMonth" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartYear" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
